toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.description: Remove obsolete AssemblyInfo.cs and Properties dir

toolRequests.intentionSummary: Remove obsolete AssemblyInfo.cs and Properties dir

data.reasoningText:
Now I have a full picture of the legacy project. Let me identify all the legacy patterns and modernize the project file.

Legacy patterns found:
1. **Old-style `<Project>` element** with `ToolsVersion` and XML namespace — SDK-style uses `<Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk">`
2. **Manual `Microsoft.Common.props` import** (line 3) — SDK-style handles this automatically
3. **Explicit Configuration/Platform defaults** (lines 5-6) — SDK-style provides these by default
4. **ProjectGuid** (line 7) — not needed in SDK-style


5. **TargetFrameworkVersion v4.7.2** (line 11) — should become `<TargetFramework>net472</TargetFramework>`
6. **FileAlignment, AutoGenerateBindingRedirects, and Deterministic settings** (lines 12-14) — all defaults in SDK-style that can be removed
7. **Verbose Debug/Release PropertyGroups** (lines 16-31) — SDK-style has sensible defaults for all these
8. **Explicit framework References** — these need to be converted to package references or removed if they're standard
9. **Explicit `<Compile>` items and manual target imports** (lines 41-46) — SDK-style handles file globbing and target imports automatically
10. **AssemblyInfo.cs** — SDK-style auto-generates this, so I can move those attributes into csproj properties and delete the file

Now I'm ready to modernize the project.

data.content:
Done. Here's a summary of **legacy patterns removed** and what replaced them:

| Legacy Pattern | Resolution |
|---|---|
| `ToolsVersion` + XML namespace on `<Project>` | → `Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk"` |
| Manual `Microsoft.Common.props` import | → Handled by SDK automatically |
| Manual `Microsoft.CSharp.targets` import | → Handled by SDK automatically |
| `TargetFrameworkVersion v4.7.2` | → `<TargetFramework>net472</TargetFramework>` |
| `ProjectGuid` | → Removed (not needed) |
| `OutputType Library` | → Removed (SDK default) |
| `Configuration`/`Platform` defaults | → Removed (SDK defaults) |
| `FileAlignment`, `Deterministic`, `AutoGenerateBindingRedirects` | → Removed (SDK defaults) |
| Debug/Release `PropertyGroup` blocks | → Removed (SDK provides sensible defaults) |
| Explicit `<Reference>` for System assemblies | → Removed (implicit with framework target) |
| Explicit `<Compile Include="...">` items | → Removed (SDK auto-globs `**/*.cs`) |
| `Properties/AssemblyInfo.cs` | → Deleted; metadata moved to `<PropertyGroup>` in csproj |

The project went from **47 lines → 16 lines** with no loss of functionality.
